reviews.review_msg: Christopher's lectures were not only long, but his voice droned on for 3 hours (an hour longer than our designated lecture time). His exams were very specific on certain things discussed in lecture yet not covered in lecture slides. Be ready to take lots of notes and read everything he assigns.

Extremely condescending to students, very intimidating & uncomfortable to be around. Made several fat shaming comments throughout the semester on famous biologists, expects students to memorize 25 min presentations and midterm is final because its at the end of the semester but it was fair, doesn't care about students suffering with anxiety, AVOID

Dr. Beh is not just one of the best profs Ive ever had, he is also one of the greatest people Ive had the pleasure of meeting. He is a phenomenal speaker, a tremendous teacher, and an unbelievable mentor. Class is fun, and he tells you what will be on the exam. Just read the papers and learn to understand them, and you will be fine!
Dr. Beh is extremely condescending to his students.

I have had Dr.Beh for both 331 and 430 now, and he is one of my favourite profs. I enjoyed 430 because he is a great speaker and gets you engaged in the topic, and the class size is so much smaller than 331, you really get to know him. Great Prof... for 331 it is incredibly difficult but that's not really him, that's just the nature of the course.
Very good speaker who made attending lectures fun. Has high expectation of his students so work hard, read the papers and participate a lot.

Lectures were very interesting, and he generally seemed like a cool guy. Midterms were fair, he recyled a few questions from problem sets from previous weeks. Make sure you know your restriction maps and primer design questions for MT 1 and Final! Only thing that really bothered me is that answers were not posted for PS's before quizzes/midterms.
Crytal clear but tooo much course material and will never give a straight up answer to a single question on practice midterm...should be 4credit course
Very hard course. Prof is not at all helpful. Gets mad at students for not doing well
